\tzpentry{ID4880}{Angular Velocity Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4880 introduces Angular Velocity Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\lim_{\tau \to \tau_c} \left| \frac{\partial^n \Omega}{\partial \tau^n} \right| = \infty, \quad \forall n \in \mathbb{N}\]
